summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Digital Twin Agent Installer Bundle Layout v2 (payload/ subfolder structure and ACL-reset fixes). All 7 test categories passed with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: POST /api/agent/installer/download-init returns correct response (download_token, pairing_code DT-XXXX-XXXX, filename.zip, is_bundle=true, expires_in=300)
GET /api/agent/installer/download returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/zip, Content-Length exact match (220,208,898 bytes), ZIP integrity verified
ZIP root contains exactly 3 files (install.cmd, README.txt, bundle.json) with NO .exe files at root
payload/ subfolder contains exactly 3 files (DigitalTwinAgentSetup_<code>.exe, agent.exe, uninstaller.exe)
Total ZIP entry count is 6 (3 root + 3 payload)
bundle.json schema correct (schema_version=2, layout='payload-subfolder', installer/agent/uninstaller paths point to payload/, entrypoint='install.cmd', pairing_code matches)
install.cmd INSTALLER variable points to payload/ subfolder
install.cmd uses pushd/popd to change into payload/ before running installer
install.cmd contains ACL-reset block with all 5 commands (takeown, icacls /reset, icacls /grant, attrib, rmdir) inside 'if exist %INSTALL_ROOT%' guard

install.cmd contains earlier fixes (setlocal EnableExtensions EnableDelayedExpansion, net session probe, VBScript UAC elevation via Shell.Application + runas, sc query/stop DigitalTwinAgent, taskkill for agent.exe/uninstaller.exe/DigitalTwinAgent.exe)
README.txt contains asterisk-boxed warning banner instructing users to only double-click install.cmd and NOT run anything inside payload/ directly
README.txt references 'payload\' in the 'How to install' file listing
Pairing code embedded in ZIP filename is recognized by /api/agent/installer/verify?code=<code> endpoint
